feed.title: Ruijie Xu
feed.subtitle: Ruijie Xu is a Ph.D. student advised by Prof. Xin Tan in the DMCV Lab at East China Normal University and a research intern at the Safe and Trustworthy AI Center, Shanghai AI Laboratory, researching embodied AI, controllable 3D scene authoring and editing, 3D vision, and trustworthy vision-language model evaluation.
